HarborRise Capital Limited (incorporated in Hong Kong and listed on the Kowloon Harbour Exchange) issues this Privacy and DSAR Workflow Notice under the Personal Data (Privacy) Ordinance (PDPO).
We collect and process personal data relating to applicants, employees, fund investors, and corporate counterparties only for HR administration, M&A diligence, fund onboarding, and listing compliance.
For avoidance of doubt, references to biometric, genetic, union, religion, sex-life, sexual-orientation, or political beliefs in this notice are policy categories; we do not solicit such data except where strictly necessary and lawful.
In Occupational Health records for Employee Ref LZ-118 (Internal HR File 0H-92), our clinic provider recorded physiotherapy treatment for a knee injury in 03-2025.
DSAR requests should be submitted via privacy.office@harborrisecap.example with Internal Case No. format DSAR-YYYY-SEQ; no original passports or HKIDs are required.
We may transfer limited personal data to service processors outside Hong Kong (e.g., cloud backup nodes in Pearl Delta Cloud Zone and Neo-Shenzhen) under contract addendum KH-XFER-12 and PDPO s.33 safeguards where applicable.
In capital markets workflows, we pseudonymise diligence files and segregate “inside information” per the SFO (specific information about a corporation that is not generally known and likely price-material) to avoid unlawful disclosure.
Publicly announced transactions, press briefs, Dragons Cup sponsorships, and sports metaphors in pitch books are not MNPI.
Our Inclusive Futures DEI Charter and Wellness Pathway content includes generic guidance on mental fitness and team union spirit, but does not collect individual health or political opinions.
Records retention: HR files 7 years post-cessation; M&A working papers until completion + 6 years; fund KYC per local AML rules; marketing lists until opt-out is actioned.
Security controls include access logging, role-based controls, and a ban on unvetted biometric tools; “Tiger Defense” is a product nickname only and not a genetic database.
Any disclosure to the Victoria Harbour Securities Commission or the Kowloon Harbour Exchange is made under statutory or listing obligations and excludes personal data not required for regulatory purposes.
We do not use customer bank account numbers, trade identifiers, or device fingerprints for profiling; examples shown in templates (e.g., 000-XYZ-000, TRADE-NA-123) are placeholders.
Complaints may be escalated to our Data Protection Officer (role mailbox: dpo@harborrisecap.example); response timelines aim to meet PDPO statutory periods and are not guaranteed for non-HK residents.
